threads.text:
💌#ZEROBASEONE 으로부터 도착한 메시지! 
앞으로 단 4일! 판을 깨는 새로운 모험이 시작되는 곳, I-LAND2에서 함께할 여러분들을 기다립니다!

[I-LAND2 GLOBAL AUDITION](~8/6, KST)

bsky.name: REMALONE
bsky.text: I have to admit that I didn’t know, and I even thought the Spanish player Cucurella’s look was quite original, when it comes to his hair, but I was unaware of this: If he let his hair grow , it’s so that his autistic son can easily recognize him  when he watches him on TV. Truly,

bsky.text: I was getting ready to mow the lawn when I noticed a Monarch butterfly sipping nectar from a Rose of Sharon bush. I ran back in to grab my camera and took a few a shots before the butterfly left to visit other flowers. Such a treat to see these beauties.
